title: Elvis Gratton: Le king des kings
original_title: Elvis Gratton, Le King des Kings
overview: A Québécois Elvis impersonator is disillusioned to find a Chinaman participating in an Elvis contest. He later takes his wife on vacation to the island of Santa Banana.

trailers.title: Elvis Gratton - Canadien français québécois... whatever
